name: Slurm OOM fixture evidence
summary: Use public-safe accounting and log snippets to check OOM triage signals.

fixtures.description: Synthetic sacct output for an out-of-memory Slurm job.
Synthetic job log with oom-kill and worker-killed signals.

commands.label: OOM reviewer requires scheduler and application evidence

checks.label: Accounting fixture contains OOM state and memory evidence
Log fixture contains application-level memory signals
OOM reviewer preserves request, peak, step, and log comparison

expected_outcomes: The skill should ask the user to compare ReqMem, MaxRSS, job steps, and logs before increasing memory.
The skill should treat missing or incomplete accounting as possible and preserve application-level evidence.
